pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source property to target Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler defaults to Java 8 source level, preventing the use of Java 11 language features and potentially causing compatibility issues with Java 11 libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler target property to target Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler generates bytecode for Java 8, which may not be compatible with Java 11 runtime expectations or libraries requiring Java 11 bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace javax.inject.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 and modern frameworks like Quarkus often rely on Jakarta EE namespaces (jakarta.*) instead of Java EE (javax.*). Without this dependency, classes using @Inject from jakarta.inject will fail to compile or run due to missing classes.
